hawkish_phrases: some members did not see sufficient evidence in support of a recalibration of monetary policy at the current meeting
more time should be given for them to unfold their full effect
purchases of sovereign debt...should be kept in reserve as a contingency measure in case of extremely adverse developments
some members expressed a preference...for limiting policy action at the current meeting to a cut in the deposit facility rate
risks to the growth outlook were seen as remaining on the downside
dovish_phrases: the degree of monetary policy accommodation would need to be re-examined
cut the interest rate on the deposit facility by 10 basis points to -0.30%
extend the intended horizon of the APP until the end of March 2017, or beyond, if necessary
reinvest the principal payments on the securities purchased under the APP as they matured, for as long as necessary
downside risks to both the growth and inflation outlook continued to prevail
summary: The ECB cut the deposit facility rate by 10bp to -0.30% and extended the APP to March 2017, but the decision was met with dissent from some members who saw insufficient evidence for further accommodation, resulting in a mildly dovish stance with meaningful hawkish pushback.
